principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Linear-style precision with glassmorphism depth.
Emotion First: The UI should feel 'Intelligent' and 'Lucid'.
Content is King: Data density for pros, breathing room for clarity.
Negative Space: Value empty areas to spotlight key metrics.
Contrast: High contrast text on subtle backgrounds. No mid-grey soup.
anti_patterns: Gradient Overload (Use gradients only for 'AI' moments or active states)

heading.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Widget titles

mono.usage: IDs, API keys, Code snippets, Data values

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all
buttons.glass: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-foreground backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm
cards.glass: rounded-xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-lg shadow-xl

inputs.base: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

sidebar.container: w-64 h-screen border-r border-border bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-sm fixed left-0 top-0 z-30 hidden lg:flex flex-col

kanban.column: flex-1 min-w-[300px] bg-secondary/30 rounded-lg p-4 border border-border/50
kanban.card: bg-card p-3 rounded-md shadow-sm border border-border cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:ring-2 hover:ring-primary/20 transition-all

avatars.description: Person in helmet (maybe avoid or use for 'creative' lead)

ai_features.lead_score_visualization: Circular progress with gradient stroke (Indigo to Purple). Score inside.
ai_features.insights_card: Card with 'sparkles' icon (Lucide). subtle purple border glow. Content in bullet points.
ai_features.prediction_graph: Line chart with 'dashed' line for future projection.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Use specific properties.
Do NOT center align the app container.
Marketing pages = Custom HTML/Tailwind. App pages = Shadcn components.
Dark mode should not be 'pure black' (#000) but rich dark grey (#09090b) or obsidian.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Set up the theme toggle first. 2. Build the Layout (Sidebar + Main Content Area) using the 'glass' strategy. 3. Implement the Dashboard with Bento Grid. 4. Build Leads List with high density. 5. Build Kanban with horizontal scroll. 6. Integrate AI features visually (gradients, sparkles).
